tools.name: POST_Send
tools.title: POST_Send
tools.description: Sends new task from activity manager to processor

parameters.name: SuplrActyTaskUUID
parameters.description:
UUID  
(Value needs to be enclosed in single quotes and prefixed with `guid`, e.g. `guid'01234567-0123-0123-0123-0123456789ab'`)

tools.name: POST_Submit
tools.title: POST_Submit
tools.description: Submits task and sends it from processor back to activity manager

parameters.name: SuplrActyTaskUUID
parameters.description:
UUID  
(Value needs to be enclosed in single quotes and prefixed with `guid`, e.g. `guid'01234567-0123-0123-0123-0123456789ab'`)

tools.name: POST_Complete
tools.title: POST_Complete
tools.description: Sets status of task to completed as final status

parameters.name: SuplrActyTaskUUID
parameters.description:
UUID  
(Value needs to be enclosed in single quotes and prefixed with `guid`, e.g. `guid'01234567-0123-0123-0123-0123456789ab'`)

tools.name: POST_RequestClarification
tools.title: POST_RequestClarification
tools.description: Requests clarification for task and sends it from activity manager back to processor

parameters.name: SuplrActyTaskUUID
parameters.description:
UUID  
(Value needs to be enclosed in single quotes and prefixed with `guid`, e.g. `guid'01234567-0123-0123-0123-0123456789ab'`)

tools.name: POST__batch
tools.title: POST__batch
tools.description:
Group multiple requests into a single request payload, see [Batch Requests](https://help.sap.com/doc/5890d27be418427993fafa6722cdc03b/Cloud/en-US/OdataV2.pdf#page=152).

*Please note that "Try it out" is not supported for this request.*

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Batch request
